commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 3:22 And the sons of Shecaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six. Counting the father in the number. (Challoner) Hebrew shisha, or "six. "Sixtus V with several manuscripts, Gothic edition, take it improperly for the name of a man. (Calmet) Semeia and his five sons are attributed to Sechenias. (Worthington) Others think that a name has been lost. (Castalion).

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Six: Counting the father in the number.
